title: Kidplokio 11pc Army Military Semi Truck Toy Vehicle Transporter 6 Diecast Cars
description:
The awesome 11pc Army Military Semi Truck Toy Vehicle Transporter with 6 Diecast Cars Playset from Kidplokio comes with six military diecast vehicles and some roadside accessories, that can be tucked away into the sides of a larger semi truck transporter toy. The larger semi truck toy features two plastic snap closure sidings to ensure all the piece stay together after playtime and don’t get lost! The front of the military army semi truck toy also features a cool, built-in diecast car slide! Kids can place diecast cars down the slide and watch the cars shoot out the front of the truck; a fun game in itself to see whose car can make it the farthest! No batteries or assembly required here

Kidplokio 11pc Army Military Semi Truck Toy Vehicle Transporter 6 Diecast Cars

The awesome 11pc Army Military Semi Truck Toy Vehicle Transporter with 6 Diecast Cars Playset from Kidplokio comes with six military diecast vehicles and some roadside accessories, that can be tucked away into the sides of a larger semi truck transporter toy. The larger semi truck toy features two plastic snap closure sidings to ensure all the piece stay together after playtime and don’t get lost!

The front of the military army semi truck toy also features a cool, built-in diecast car slide! Kids can place diecast cars down the slide and watch the cars shoot out the front of the truck; a fun game in itself to see whose car can make it the farthest! No batteries or assembly required here.

Key Features

  • ARMY MILITARY SEMI TRUCK TOY: This awesome semi truck toy comes with 6 military diecast vehicles, that can be tucked away into the sides of a larger semi truck transporter toy! The larger semi truck toy features two plastic snap closure sidings to ensure all the piece stay together after playtime
  • COOL BUILT IN DIECAST CAR SLIDE: The front of the military army semi truck toy features a cool built in diecast car slide! Kids can place diecast cars down slide and watch it shoot out the front of the toy truck to see whose car can make it the farthest! No batteries or assembly required here
  • ENDLESS PRETEND PLAY POSSIBILITIES: With so many playing options available, kids will have hours of fun, racing cars and driving the large semi truck toy; this vehicle playset is also great for cognitive development as kids think up lots of pretend play scenarios, while also working their gross and fine motor skills playing with cars and semi truck toy
  • GREAT TOY TRUCK FOR TRAVEL: The army military kids semi truck toy is constructed of heavy duty, durable plastic, meaning it can stand up to lots of everyday playtime wear and tear; the plastic side snap closure and retractable carrier handle make this a great toy to travel
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Age Group: 3+; Color: Yellow; Weight: 1.15 pounds; Material: plastic

Product Specifications

  • MPN: KPMITCTGRN
  • UPC: 855569009298
  • Color: Green

The army military toy truck car transporter is constructed of heavy-duty, durable plastic, meaning it can stand up to lots of everyday playtime wear and tear whether at home, traveling or out at play dates. In addition, playing with a manual truck toy can also help your little one use his or her imagination, encourage exploration and creativity, sharpen their motor skills and learn to share with their playmates too!

With a military army theme, clever design, easy travel portability and battery and/or charge-free, hours of fun playtime for little ones and their friends or siblings await!

Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts)

Recommended Ages: 3+
